title: Peace with Iran hinges on one side bowing to the other’s nuclear demands
summary_full: The Trump administration has sought a moratorium on uranium enrichment of at least 20 years. Tehran’s offer would last up to five.
summary_public: The Trump administration has sought a moratorium on uranium enrichment of at least 20 years. Tehran’s offer would last up to five.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: Peace with Iran hinges on one side bowing to the other’s nuclear demands
